name: nteract
description: Create, edit, and run Jupyter notebooks with Codex

interface.shortDescription: Create, edit, and run Jupyter notebooks from Codex
interface.longDescription: nteract brings Jupyter notebooks to Codex. Create notebooks, execute Python and Deno code, visualize data, manage dependencies, and inspect rich outputs from your conversation.
defaultPrompt: Create a notebook, run code, and inspect the outputs
Open an existing notebook and help me iterate on the analysis
Add dependencies and debug a failing notebook workflow
